title: Yvette Cortez (Big Brothers Big Sisters) — Valeria reference rejected
html:
Email from Yvette Cortez (Customer Relations & Enrollment Coordinator at Big Brothers Big Sisters mentoring program, ycortez@bgmentoring.org) telling Yahir his reference Valeria cannot be approved as "co-worker" because she stated she's his sibling — confirming family relationship. Family-reference quota already met by Cameron; needs a current/past co-worker who's known him 1+ year. Also: still missing background checks + updated car-insurance policy (Progressive ID card attached). Yahir was applying to mentor through BBBS Austin (4800 Manor Rd).

TL;DR

  • Confirms Valeria is Yahir's sibling — the disclosure happened on her own reference form.
  • Yahir applying to volunteer-mentor through Big Brothers Big Sisters Austin in early 2026.
  • Reference panel: Valeria (sister, disqualified) + Cameron (brother, accepted) — needs one more co-worker reference.
  • Progressive is Yahir's auto-insurance carrier.

valeria · cameron lewis · bbbs austin · austin tx · progressive insurance · yahir family
